HERMÈS Mini Roulis 19 - Evercolor Black with Gold Hardware

Product Details:
Model: Roulis Mini 19
Material: Evercolor Leather
Colour: Black
Hardware: Gold-tone (GHW)
Stamp: U (2022)
Dimensions: 18 x 16 x 5 cm

Style Notes:
The embodiment of quiet luxury, the Hermès Roulis offers a more refined, subtle elegance than the Constance. It is incredibly versatile, perfect for everyday use, and exudes a sophisticated, intellectual charm. Extremely difficult to acquire directly from the boutique (retail value approx. $10,100 USD). Don't miss this opportunity to own a highly sought-after piece at an excellent price.

Condition Report:
 Pristine condition. The bag is in its original, immaculate state, showing virtually no signs of use. Please examine all photos carefully before placing your order.
